name: jarvis-plugin
description: Persistent AI memory for Claude Code — remembers who you are, how you think, and what you've decided across every session

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Bearer token for Jarvis server authentication

cacheDir.title: Cache Directory
cacheDir.description: Local file cache directory for vault files

workerPort.title: Worker Port
workerPort.description: Port for local background file sync worker

extraHeaders.title: Extra Headers
extraHeaders.description: Additional HTTP headers as JSON object, e.g. {"CF-Access-Client-Id":"...","CF-Access-Client-Secret":"..."}
